goal: C0 IPC via gate_up/down_proj preq GEMV tiling
cpp_changes: gemv_q4_preq_restored.cpp: enable 4-group fused inner loop by default (was gated on ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=1)
gemv_q4_preq_restored.cpp: preq_tile_accumulate_g4 — load x_q8 once per 4-group tile, share across NRows output rows
gemv_q4_preq_restored.cpp: preq_row_accumulate_one_group_xloaded — shared x_q8 for single-group tail
unified_engine.cpp: no dispatch change — gate_up/down already use gemv_q4_32_preq_fused_avx2 on fused_preq path

regression_fix.regression_root_cause: Phase G enabled g4 fused inner loop on all projections by default (ignoring ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=0) and auto 8-row for out_features>=8192. Microbench speedup was vs single-group fallback, not the production 4-row path. gate_up g4 tiling + OMP partial tiles regressed E2E gate_up ~41ms to ~49ms and tok/s ~9.05 to ~8.15.
fix: preq_use_g4_inner: restore ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=0 gating; optional ASDSL_PREQ_G4GATE_UP_ONLY=1 for gate_up-only g4 experiments
gemv_q4_32_preq_fused_avx2: remove 8-row auto; default 4-row unless ASDSL_GEMV_UNROLL=8 explicit
When g4 off: restore pre-G preq_row_accumulate_one_group loop (not xloaded path)

gate_up_16384x3072.before_note: Pre-Phase-G 4row path skipped g4 fused loop unless ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=1; est. from single-group fallback
gate_up_16384x3072.note_post_fix: E2E parity uses 4-row + no g4 on gate_up; microbench fused_auto not representative of production path

c0_e2e.note: Best warm runs recover toward baseline (~8.5-8.6 tok/s, gate_up ~44ms); laptop thermal variance remains high

recommendation: Keep g4 tiling code behind ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=1 for experiments; parity C0 stays g4-off on gate_up
Hard-default ASDSL_GEMV_UNROLL=4 in parity manifest; never auto 8-row
Next IPC targets: QKV prefetch tuning (groups=2 regresses on this HW), lm_head 4-bit — not gate_up g4-by-default
AHSD remains non-viable at α=15%; pivot confirmed to C0 kernel IPC

post_fix_cold.fix_summary: Restored pre-G unified tail loop: single-group tail always uses preq_row_accumulate_one_group (classic), never preq_row_accumulate_one_group_xloaded. xloaded only reachable when ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=1 g4 tile path is active (diagnostic: 1572864 classic / 0 xloaded on gate_up parity path). phi4_cpu_run setdefault ASDSL_PREQ_PREFETCH_GROUPS=0 and ASDSL_GEMV_UNROLL=4.
post_fix_cold.xloaded_on_hot_path_before_fix: No on parity (G4FUSED=0) — but g4-on tail and if/else structure differed from pre-G; unified classic tail restored. Default prefetch=8 when env unset may have added E2E overhead.

profile_decode_token_3_per_layer_ms.note: Engine profile prints cumulative ms over 32 layers; divide by 32 for per-layer. gate_up at/below 41ms target on best profile slice.

prefetch_probe_qkv_per_layer_ms.verdict: prefetch=2 regresses qkv on i7-1360P; keep parity at 0

c0_e2e_tok_s.note: Severe laptop thermal throttling during agent session (wall ~3.5s/token); profile-derived per-layer gate_up/total match pre-Phase-G baseline. Re-run cold parity after 10min idle for headline tok/s.

native_extension_env_audit.hypothesis: 0.31 tok/s caused by Torch fallback when _native_unified missing in parity subprocess

parity_benchmark_env.fix_applied: Defensive PYTHONPATH prepend + verify_native_extensions() preflight + capture inference_mode/unified_active from subprocess stdout

phi4_cpu_run.setdefault_overrides: ASDSL_FUSED_GEMV=1, ASDSL_PREQ_G4FUSED=0, ASDSL_PREQ_PREFETCH_GROUPS=0, ASDSL_GEMV_UNROLL=4 (only if unset)

native_extension_env_audit.root_cause_confirmed: NOT missing native extensions or subprocess env strip. UnifiedEngine active; decode ~0.29-0.31 tok/s matches engine profile total ~3249ms/token (gate_up ~42ms/layer, same as kernel microbench). Likely sustained thermal/power cap (CPU ~2.2 GHz); cold idle re-run needed for ~9 tok/s headline.
